data: message intake -> INSERT task(state='NEW') -> SELECT NEW ORDER BY created_at -> UPDATE 'IN_PROGRESS' -> process_ai_task -> OpenRouter call -> response -> send_reply -> UPDATE DONE/FAILED -> memory write/read

Telegram message -> telegram_daemon.py -> task created in core.db -> task_worker.py picks task (INTAKE/IN_PROGRESS) -> process_ai_task via core.ai_router -> ask_ai.py -> lib/orchestra_runtime.execute -> result saved in DB -> task_worker reads result -> _normalize_result cleans output -> reply_sender sends message -> state REPLIED

Telegram message -> telegram_daemon.py -> task created in core.db -> task_worker.py picks task (INTAKE/IN_PROGRESS) -> process_ai_task via core.ai_router -> ask_ai.py -> lib/orchestra_runtime.execute -> result saved in DB -> task_worker reads result -> _normalize_result cleans output -> reply_sender sends message -> state REPLIED

message intake -> INSERT task state='NEW' -> SELECT NEW ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1 -> UPDATE state='IN_PROGRESS' -> process_ai_task -> OpenRouter HTTP request -> parse response -> send_reply to Telegram -> UPDATE DONE or FAILED -> memory write user_input and assistant_output -> memory read for next context
